song.title: King Of Glory
song.author: Chris Tomlin and Jesse Reeves
song.presentation: V1 C1 V2 C1 B C2
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C Lift up your gaze, be lifted up . F Tell everyone how great the love . Am The love come down from heaven’s gate . F To kiss the earth with hope and grace.
Sing
[C1] .C F Who is this King of Glory? The Lord, strong and mighty. .Am F C Who is this King of Glory? The Lord, strong and mighty
[V2] . C Lift up your hands, be lifted up . F Let the redeemed declare the love . Am And we bow down at heaven’s gate . F To kiss the feet of hope and grace
[B] . F G There is one God! He is Holy . Am C There is one Lord over everything . F G There is one King, He is Jesus .Am F King of glory, strong and mighty
[C2] .C F You are the King of Glory! The Lord, strong and mighty. .Am F C You are the King of Glory! The Lord, strong and mighty
